description: User hovers over the video overlay in the top right corner while transcription text appears.
The view switches and the task prompt text 'Queensland and you're planning a holiday to London' appears.
User pauses to read the initial part of the task prompt.
User hovers over the video overlay as transcription text updates.
The task prompt is updated with the text 'you would'.
User hovers over the video overlay.
The task prompt is updated with 'you would consider first when planning'.
User hovers over the video overlay.
The task prompt is updated with 'Show us where you start,'.
User hovers over the video overlay.
The task prompt is updated with 'Show us where you start, what' and 'approach this however you normally would'.
User pauses to read the updated prompt.
The task prompt is updated with 'you prioritise,' and 'and how you move through'.
User pauses to read the prompt.
The task prompt is updated with 'the planning process'.
User pauses to read the final part of the prompt.
